# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)
> **日期**: 2026-05-01 | **更新时间**: 07:15 (北京时间)
> **监控范围**: Global (In vivo/FDA) & China (NMPA/Biotech)

---

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[21:00]` **单细胞多组学可在 CAR-T 疗法中实现高分辨率向量拷贝数分析**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Single-Cell Multiomics Enables High-Resolution Vector Copy Number Profiling in CAR-T Therapies* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[21:00]` **安斯泰来将在 ARVO 2026 年会上重点介绍地理萎缩的新发现**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Astellas to Highlight New Findings for Geographic Atrophy at ARVO 2026 Annual Meeting* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:30]` **Factor Bioscience 将在 ISCT 2026 上展示体内靶向卵巢癌的工程化 i巨噬细胞 (FACT-112)**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Factor Bioscience to Showcase Engineered iMacrophages (FACT-112) Targeting Ovarian Cancer In Vivo at ISCT 2026* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:00]` **Kernal Biologics 将在 ASGCT 2026 上展示用于原位 CAR T 编程的 mRNA 2.0 平台和 T 细胞靶向 LNP**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Kernal Biologics to Showcase mRNA 2.0 Platform and T-Cell-Targeted LNPs for In Situ CAR T Programming at ASGCT 2026* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:00]` **Scribe Therapeutics 将在 2026 年 ASGCT 和 EAS 大会上重点展示工程化 CRISPR 平台的进步并引领心脏代谢产品线**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Scribe Therapeutics to Highlight Engineered CRISPR Platform Advances and Lead Cardiometabolic Pipeline at ASGCT and EAS Congress 2026* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[14:25]` **Curocell 的 RIMQARTO Inj。获得监管部门全面批准，有望进军 CAR-T 市场，完成率达 67%**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Curocell's RIMQARTO Inj. Wins Full Regulatory Approval, Poised to Enter CAR-T Market with 67% Complete Response Rate* [🔗Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5)</small>
